title: hieracium eurylepium subsp. pachypilon
intro: Hieracium eurylepium subsp. pachypilon, also known as Hieracium pachypilum, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion-like genus Hieracium in the sunflower family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues, fever, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Hieracium eurylepium subsp. pachypilon include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to soothe digestive issues and combat infections. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
